mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT MSG_VERSION AS msgVersion ,FLD_ENG_NM AS fldEngNm ,FLD_KOR_NM AS fldKorNm ,DATA_TYPE_NM AS dataTypeNm ,ARRAY_SIZE_REF_VAL AS arraySizeRefVal ,BASIC_VAL AS basicVal ,ENC_YN AS encYn ,PARENT_FLD_NM AS parentFldNm ,IO_KEY AS ioKey ,EXTRNL_MSG_BIZ_CD_YN AS extrnlMsgBizCdYn ,EXTRNL_SRCH_KEY_YN AS extrnlSrchKeyYn ,CHILD_DTO_NM AS childDtoNm ,FLD_UNQ_ID AS fldUnqId ,EXTRNL_MSG_NO_YN AS extrnlMsgNoYn ,MSG_LAYOUT_ID AS msgLayoutId ,MSG_SEQ AS msgSeq ,MSG_LEN AS msgLen ,DECIMAL_LEN AS decimalLen ,MASKING_WAY_CD AS maskingWayCd ,ENC_WAY_CD AS encWayCd ,ALIGN_NM AS alignNm ,PRIVACY_YN AS privacyYn ,CD_ATTR_NM AS cdAttrNm ,FILLER_VAL AS fillerVal ,ISO8583_LEN_FLD_COPY_YN AS iso8583LenFldCopyYn ,ISO8583_FLD_DATA_LEN AS iso8583FldDataLen ,ISO8583_FLD_MAX_LEN AS iso8583FldMaxLen ,FLD_LV_NO AS fldLvNo ,EXTRNL_PROCESSOR_CD_YN AS extrnlProcessorCdYn ,ISO8583_SPEC_NO_VAL AS iso8583SpecNo ,ISO8583_FLD_CHAR_SET_CD AS iso8583FldCharSetCd ,ISO8583_VARIABLE_YN AS iso8583VariableYn ,ISO8583_FLD_LEN_TYPE_CD AS iso8583FldLenTypeCd ,ISO8583_LEN_FLD_INCL_YN AS iso8583LenFldInclYn ,ISO8583_TRNSMSN_DATA_LEN AS iso8583TrnsmsnDataLen ,ISO8583_TRNSMSN_LEN AS iso8583TrnsmsnLen ,EXTRNL_OFFSET_YN AS extrnlOffsetYn ,PRIVACY_DSCD AS privacyDscd ,FLD_RMK AS fldRmk ,RSRV_FLD_VAL1 AS rsrvFldVal1 ,RSRV_FLD_VAL2 AS rsrvFldVal2 ,RSRV_FLD_VAL3 AS rsrvFldVal3 ,META_VALID_VAL AS metaValidVal ,CFG_DESC AS cfgDesc ,INDS_YN AS indsYn ,ISO8583_LEN_FLD_LEN AS iso8583LenFldLen ,FLD_ENCODING_CD AS fldEncodingCd ,FLD_TRNSFRM_CD AS fldTrnsfrmCd ,REPL_KEY AS replKey ,KOR_INCL_YN AS korInclYn ,PARAM_TYPE AS paramType ,@rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
FROM TBMSGLAYOUTDT WHERE 1=1
AND MSG_LAYOUT_ID = #{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
order by MSG_LAYOUT_ID, MSG_SEQ ) p , (SELECT @rownum := 0) r where p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) and p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBMSGLAYOUTDT WHERE 1=1
AND MSG_LAYOUT_ID = #{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}

SELECT MSG_VERSION AS msgVersion ,FLD_ENG_NM AS fldEngNm ,FLD_KOR_NM AS fldKorNm ,DATA_TYPE_NM AS dataTypeNm ,ARRAY_SIZE_REF_VAL AS arraySizeRefVal ,BASIC_VAL AS basicVal ,ENC_YN AS encYn ,PARENT_FLD_NM AS parentFldNm ,IO_KEY AS ioKey ,EXTRNL_MSG_BIZ_CD_YN AS extrnlMsgBizCdYn ,EXTRNL_SRCH_KEY_YN AS extrnlSrchKeyYn ,CHILD_DTO_NM AS childDtoNm ,FLD_UNQ_ID AS fldUnqId ,EXTRNL_MSG_NO_YN AS extrnlMsgNoYn ,MSG_LAYOUT_ID AS msgLayoutId ,MSG_SEQ AS msgSeq ,MSG_LEN AS msgLen ,DECIMAL_LEN AS decimalLen ,MASKING_WAY_CD AS maskingWayCd ,ENC_WAY_CD AS encWayCd ,ALIGN_NM AS alignNm ,PRIVACY_YN AS privacyYn ,CD_ATTR_NM AS cdAttrNm ,FILLER_VAL AS fillerVal ,ISO8583_LEN_FLD_COPY_YN AS iso8583LenFldCopyYn ,ISO8583_FLD_DATA_LEN AS iso8583FldDataLen ,ISO8583_FLD_MAX_LEN AS iso8583FldMaxLen ,FLD_LV_NO AS fldLvNo ,EXTRNL_PROCESSOR_CD_YN AS extrnlProcessorCdYn ,ISO8583_SPEC_NO_VAL AS iso8583SpecNo ,ISO8583_FLD_CHAR_SET_CD AS iso8583FldCharSetCd ,ISO8583_VARIABLE_YN AS iso8583VariableYn ,ISO8583_FLD_LEN_TYPE_CD AS iso8583FldLenTypeCd ,ISO8583_LEN_FLD_INCL_YN AS iso8583LenFldInclYn ,ISO8583_TRNSMSN_DATA_LEN AS iso8583TrnsmsnDataLen ,ISO8583_TRNSMSN_LEN AS iso8583TrnsmsnLen ,EXTRNL_OFFSET_YN AS extrnlOffsetYn ,PRIVACY_DSCD AS privacyDscd ,FLD_RMK AS fldRmk ,RSRV_FLD_VAL1 AS rsrvFldVal1 ,RSRV_FLD_VAL2 AS rsrvFldVal2 ,RSRV_FLD_VAL3 AS rsrvFldVal3 ,META_VALID_VAL AS metaValidVal ,CFG_DESC AS cfgDesc ,INDS_YN AS indsYn ,ISO8583_LEN_FLD_LEN AS iso8583LenFldLen ,FLD_ENCODING_CD AS fldEncodingCd ,FLD_TRNSFRM_CD AS fldTrnsfrmCd ,REPL_KEY AS replKey ,KOR_INCL_YN AS korInclYn ,PARAM_TYPE AS paramType FROM TBMSGLAYOUTDT WHERE MSG_LAYOUT_ID = #{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} order by MSG_LAYOUT_ID, MSG_SEQ
mapper.update: DELETE FROM TBMSGLAYOUTDT WHERE MSG_LAYOUT_ID = #{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select DISTINCT(MSG_LAYOUT_ID) from TBMSGLAYOUTDT where CHILD_DTO_NM = #{childDtoNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
and MSG_LAYOUT_ID not in(#{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR})
